raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Stating a conditional prediction about behavior",
  "implicit_claims": ["The person is already in bed", "Effort to sleep is distinct from physical position in bed", "Lying quietly follows automatically from absence of sleep effort"],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent as a conditional but rests on an underspecified causal link between effort and posture",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Context requires describing passive rest states or distinguishing intentional sleep attempts from mere presence in bed",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Audience assumes lying in bed implies sleep effort or that the statement endorses insomnia-promoting behavior"
}
